A note from us

Gentle Reminder

✦ ✦ ✦
  • Please be on time and presentable for the ceremony.
  • Snap & Share — capture the love and share your photos with us.
  • Kindly silence your phones during the ceremony.
  • Please be seated before the ceremony begins.
  • Most importantly — come ready to celebrate with your whole heart!

Hope you can make it and God bless!

John & Princila
